faqs.question: Why are flies so common in Morningside Heights apartments?
faqs.answer: Morningside Heights' older apartment buildings often have gaps around windows, worn weather stripping, and aging waste management systems that attract flies. The neighborhood's many restaurants, delis, and food vendors along Broadway and Amsterdam Avenue also contribute to elevated fly populations, especially during warmer months. Our targeted treatments address both entry points and breeding sites specific to Morningside Heights buildings.
